name: event_id
description: Unique identifier for the traffic detection event (UUID v4)

name: timestamp
description: UTC timestamp when the vehicle passed the sensor

name: vehicle_type
description: Type of vehicle: car | truck | bus | motorcycle | bicycle

name: direction
description: Travel direction: north | south | east | west

name: is_emergency
description: True if the vehicle is an emergency vehicle

name: speed_category
description: Derived speed band: stationary | slow | normal | fast | very_fast

name: ingested_at
description: Timestamp when Dataflow wrote this row to BigQuery

name: event_date
description: Date portion of timestamp — used as the partition column

name: time_of_day
description: Time of day period: night | early_morning | rush_morning | midday | rush_evening | evening

name: weather
description: Weather condition: clear | rain | fog | snow

name: incident_nearby
description: Whether a traffic incident was active near this intersection
